content.problemStatement:
### **Aptitude Practice Question**

Which of the following is the correct passive voice of the sentence: "She completed the project before the deadline"?

a) The project is completed by her before the deadline.

b) The project was completed by her before the deadline.

c) The project will be completed by her before the deadline.

d) The project has b

---

### **Answer & Explanation**

een completed by her before the deadline.

Solution: b) The project was completed by her before the deadline.Explanation: 

The sentence is in the past tense, so the correct passive form is in the past tense as well. "Was completed" is the correct passive form.
